metadata.description: Engineering State Runtime — structured task tracking, state management, and DAG execution for coding agents

plugins.name: pi-esr
plugins.description: Structured entity tracking, state management, and DAG execution. Creates a queryable knowledge graph from every coding session: entities with typed relations, task lifecycle (draft→active→stable), closure protocol with evaluations and artifacts, DAG execution via esr_create_node + esr_run, and persistent memory for cross-session context.
